column1: Flexbox -- A layout system used to arrange items in a row or column with flexible sizing and alignment.
Grid -- A two-dimensional layout system for creating complex responsive designs with rows and columns.
Margin -- Controls the outer space around an element.
Padding -- Controls the inner space between content and the element's border.
Display -- Defines how an element is displayed (block
Position -- Specifies how an element is positioned (static
Z-index -- Controls the vertical stacking order of positioned elements.
Overflow -- Determines what happens when content overflows its container.
Box-sizing -- Defines how width and height are calculated (content-box or border-box).
Border -- Sets the border around an element including width
